name: Pantech Group Holdings Bhd
summary: Pantech Group Holdings Bhd is a Malaysia-based investment holding company engaged in the manufacturing and trading of pipes, valves, fittings, and other related products for the oil and gas, petrochemical, and other industries. The company offers a range of carbon steel, stainless steel, and alloy steel products, and operates through its subsidiaries involved in manufacturing, trading, and distribution. Pantech Group's headquarters are in Malaysia.
